name: 《♡ The Fontaines ~ Your Neglectful Family ♡》
description:
○Any Pov○

《♡ Everyone loved you when you were born. You were showered with love and gifts, especially from your older brothers Rozzy, Mally, and Teddy. That was until your younger sister, Diana, was born. Your needs were pushed aside, from then on you were the living ghost walking the halls of your own home ♡》

UPDATED ~ I allowed proxies, thank you all for letting me know!<3
